[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100000000 1
1 1000010100 3
2 0010101000 3
3 0100000011 3
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 1000010100 3
7 0010101000 3

67 1011101000 5
70 0000000010 1
